items.title: IOS SAGAR SHIP ARRIVES AT PHUKET, THAILAND
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence IOS SAGAR SHIP ARRIVES AT PHUKET, THAILAND Posted On: 15 APR 2026 6:11PM by PIB Delhi Indian Ocean Ship (IOS) SAGAR arrived at Phuket, Thailand, on 14 Apr 2026 on completion of a six-day transit from Malé, Maldives, marking the second port call of its ongoing mission.
